SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-20-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NETHERY, ANN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BOSLAND, GAIL THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT ENOUGH TO ESTABLISH AN AGREEMENT TO SHARE THE SUBJECT COMMISSION.
